Title: Known Criminals Sighted
Criminal Activity in Progress
Wanted Criminals Spotted
Report of Hostile Activity
Description:
Word has just arrived that a group associated with the notorious [Client] gang has been spotted at [Location]. While their intentions remain uncertain, we can all agree that it is too dangerous to allow them to carry out whatever misdeeds they are hoping to accomplish. 

Crusader is forming a combat response team ASAP. Grab whatever gear you'll need and head over to [Location] on the double. [CombatPay]And please, try to be safe!

CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

Outlaws identified as members of the [Client] have been seen infilitrating a [Location]. We've been after these particular bad eggs for a while now, so as you can imagine Crusader Security is pretty eager to assemble a team to deal with them. [CombatPay]

If you're interested, grab whatever gear you'll need and get going. It'd be great if we could settle this whole thing as quickly and safely as possible.

CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

Armed members of a local criminal outfit, the [Client], were seen at [Location]. We can only assume their intentions are hostile so a small team is being assembled to go and clear them out. [CombatPay] 

Now, since we don't want them to give us the slip, figured it would be wise to contact all operators in the area, regardless of skill or track record. If you're available — and I'm assuming you are — hurry up and grab your equipment. These [Client] are well overdue for their day of reckoning.


CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Gibbs
ID# 91G66BW0

Moments ago, we received a tip that several members of the [Client] outlaw organization were reported at [Location]. It's vital that we stop them before they can commit any more criminal acts.

To that end, we're assembling a squad of armed and trained operators to go in and secure the site. [CombatPay]Contractors are expected to provide their own transportation and weapons. I feel like shouldn't have to say that, but you'd be surprised how many so-called 'professionals' accept a contract thinking they can borrow some from us. Next thing you'll know they'll be asking us to squeeze the trigger for them too. 


CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Gibbs
ID# 91G66BW0
CombatPay: In addition to the standard contract payment, there will be a bonus issued for each combatant you successfully neutralize.
Unfortunately, we've been unable to determine the size of the force you'll be up against, but will issue you Hazard Pay for each hostile you manage to deal with successfully.
I've also been cleared to issue Hazard Pay that scales for each outlaw you take care of.
And to preemptively answer your question, yes, in addition to the normal flat fee there will be Hazard Pay issued for each hostile you clear from the site.
